response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable generalist software engineer with ~15+ years of hands-on experience and genuine entrepreneurial drive, but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with recognized AI expertise, deep cloud platform knowledge, and a demonstrated track record advising enterprise customers. His AI exposure is recent and narrow (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025), with no history of building or scaling AI-powered products, no advanced AI-related degree, and no evidence of the executive-level influence or customer-facing strategic advisory work this Principal Engineer role centers on.
strengths: Breadth of engineering experience spanning ~15 years across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq signals emerging alignment with the AI focus area
Demonstrated entrepreneurial mindset via GISCollective founding and history of knowledge-sharing through workshops and conference talks
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related field, and no research or published work in AI/ML that would establish 'recognized expertise'
AI experience is very recent (early 2025) and limited to developer tooling; no track record building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No evidence of director-level strategic work — advising enterprise customers, shaping cloud product roadmaps, or operating as a technical thought leader at the organizational scope this role requires
